question: Implement GeGLU (Gated Exponential Linear Unit) activation used in LLaMA. The formula is GeGLU(x) = GELU(x_gate) * x_value, where the input is split in half along the last dimension - one half acts as a gate that goes through GELU, and the other half provides the values.
code_hint: Use torch.chunk to split the input tensor into two halves along the last dimension, apply F.gelu to the gate part, then multiply element-wise with the value part.
